nimblestudio.studio.AdminRoleArn.Description: The IAM role that studio admins assume when logging in to the Nimble Studio portal.

nimblestudio.studio.DisplayName.Description: A friendly name for the studio.

nimblestudio.studio.StudioEncryptionConf.Description: Configuration of the encryption method that is used for the studio.

nimblestudio.studio.StudioName.Description: The name of the studio, as included in the URL when accessing it in the Nimble Studio portal.

nimblestudio.studio.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).

nimblestudio.studio.UserRoleArn.Description: The IAM role that studio users assume when logging in to the Nimble Studio portal.
